summary: Completed testing of PRC Burn Control and EMI Integration features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: PRC Burn Control page loads correctly with stats/settings/controls, AdminBankWithdrawals has all 3 tabs (Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault) working correctly, PRC Burn Control link in AdminLayout sidebar menu works.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PRC Burn Control GET /api/admin/prc-burn-control/settings - returns enabled, burn_percentage, min_balance, target_type correctly
✅ PRC Burn Control GET /api/admin/prc-burn-control/stats - returns total_prc_circulation, total_users, eligible_users, estimated_burn
✅ PRC Burn Control POST /api/admin/prc-burn-control/settings - validates percentage range (0.1%-50%), saves settings correctly
✅ PRC Burn Control POST /api/admin/prc-burn-control/execute - blocks execution when burn is disabled
✅ AdminBankWithdrawals.js - All 3 tabs present: Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault
✅ AdminBankWithdrawals.js - EMI handlers (handleEmiApprove, handleEmiReject) correctly use bill-payment API endpoints
✅ AdminLayout.js - PRC Burn Control link at line 215 under Controls & Security section
✅ App.js - Route for /admin/prc-burn-control at line 337 correctly loads AdminPRCBurnControl component

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly with expected UI elements

seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC Burn Control feature fully implemented and tested. API endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/prc-burn-control/settings (get/save settings), GET /api/admin/prc-burn-control/stats (PRC circulation stats), POST /api/admin/prc-burn-control/execute (execute burn). AdminBankWithdrawals unified payment dashboard has Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault tabs all working. EMI uses existing bill-payment API with payment_type filter.

prc_burn_control_api.post_settings: Saves settings with validation, logs admin action

admin_bank_withdrawals_ui.tabs: Bank Redeem (with badge), EMI Pay, Savings Vault - all 3 present and clickable
admin_bank_withdrawals_ui.stats_cards: Pending, Approved, Rejected, Total Requests - dynamically update per tab
admin_bank_withdrawals_ui.filters: Status filters, Date range, Sort order - all functional
admin_bank_withdrawals_ui.hdfc_export: HDFC Export dropdown with Bank Redeem, Savings Vault, EMI, Combined options
admin_bank_withdrawals_ui.pending_requests: Bank Redeem shows actual pending request from SANTOSH SHAMRAO AVHALE

prc_burn_control_ui.stats_display: Total PRC in Circulation, Total Users, Eligible for Burn, Estimated Burn
prc_burn_control_ui.settings_form: Enable toggle, Burn Percentage input, Minimum Balance, Target Users dropdown
prc_burn_control_ui.actions: Save Settings, Execute Burn Now buttons
prc_burn_control_ui.warnings: Important Notes section with burn behavior warnings

admin_layout_menu.prc_burn_control_link: Under Controls & Security section - navigates to /admin/prc-burn-control correctly
